text:
- [reply needed] Don Cooper: Don Cooper following up to schedule their next meeting and proposing another discussion about hardware resources.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch sent a follow-up email mentioning a painting attachment that was apparently missing from a previous message.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch forwarded preliminary layer paintings from Scott for a Jacob wrestling artwork project.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch introduced Mike and Scott regarding cover design work and expects them to coordinate directly.
- [scheduling] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley sending Zoom link for a Saturday morning meeting at 10am.
- [scheduling] Alan Beasley: Alan Beasley confirmed a Zoom meeting scheduled for Saturday at 10am Pacific Daylight Time.
- [no action] "Sol's Civic Minute!": Newsletter from Sol's Civic Minute announcing summer break and last issue until September.
- [no action] mmmichaelllang: GitHub notification that a weekly audit workflow run failed in the jeeves-unchained repository.
- [no action] CARFAX Car Care: CARFAX vehicle care report and service reminder for a Subaru Outback.
- [no action] Apple: Apple security notification that an Apple Account was used to sign in to iCloud via web browser.
